title: Aterian Inc (ATER) Q2 2024 Earnings Highlights
text: Aterian reported mixed results for Q2 2024. The company achieved adjusted EBITDA profitability for the first time in 10 quarters, representing a significant turnaround. However, net revenue declined 20.6% year-over-year to $28 million, largely due to SKU rationalization efforts. Gross margin expanded to 60.4% from 42.2% previously. Net loss improved dramatically to $3.6 million from $34.8 million. Cash position strengthened to $20.3 million. Inventory declined substantially to $18.4 million from $36.7 million. The company faces ongoing headwinds including high container costs and volatile consumer spending due to the inflationary environment. Additional obstacles involve logistics complications from Amazon's Seller Fulfilled Prime program changes and occasional product stockouts. Management emphasized focusing more on organic growth rather than acquisitions. The company plans cautious expansion through new platforms like Mercado Libre and Target Plus, while exploring selective relaunches of previously discontinued products where market conditions support viability.
